entries.allowedScope: keep using for identity, pad, and vehicle-family linkage
entries.notes: Current repo already uses this source; Phase 2 work now backfills rocket_family from ll2_rocket_configs.family.

entries.allowedScope: keep the existing SpaceX infographic adapter limited to infographic corroboration and landing hints
entries.notes: Existing repo adapter already writes mission bundles and mission_infographic constraints. Do not promote this source into direct ascent-truth authority.

entries.allowedScope: continue URL discovery and timeline context only
entries.notes: Existing mission-page discovery stays allowed, but no trajectory-truth adapter should be built yet.

entries.sourceFamily: Rocket Lab mission and updates pages
entries.notes: Derived seeds exist, but that is not enough to admit an ingest.
Allowed only as corroboration and ops context. Not allowed as ascent-truth source.

entries.sourceFamily: public FAA live or geospatial surfaces as consumer ascent truth
entries.notes: Do not build product logic on the assumption that public FAA surfaces expose launch-ready live ascent trajectories for our launches.

entries.sourceFamily: provider or agency visibility maps and interactive visibility assets
entries.notes: Keep as opportunistic. Only promote to pass after per-source reviews show stable publication and useful future-launch coverage.

entries.sourceFamily: mission-specific special-event priors such as relights, venting, tracer-style events
entries.notes: Do not scaffold production ingest until coverage across real future launches becomes useful.

entries.sourceFamily: OCR-first infographic extraction without stronger source coverage
entries.allowedScope: only after official-doc path is healthy
entries.notes: The roadmap explicitly avoids OCR-first investment before parser operations and official-doc coverage are strong.

entries.sourceFamily: operator-provided or licensed partner live feeds
entries.notes: If this becomes available later, it must stay a separately labeled partner_live path rather than silently replacing prediction.
